Duplicate detection runs on effective patterns, across groups.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26
-- main.go --
package main

import "os"

func main() { os.Exit(run()) }
-- web/web.go --
package web

import "net/http"

//fabrik:http:group /api
type A struct{}

//fabrik:http GET /users
func (a *A) Users(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}

//fabrik:http:group /api
type B struct{}

//fabrik:http GET /users
func (b *B) Users(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}
-- want/diags --
error: web/web.go:14:1: duplicate route GET /api/users
  help: first declared at $WORK/web/web.go:8:1
